data.body: PASS 1 review (T10 Infrastructure/IaC overlay): not-applicable. This plan is an application-architecture change (snapshot isolation for code-reading gates) and does not provision or configure infrastructure-as-code (no Terraform/CDK/Pulumi/Ansible/K8s/Helm, no cloud resource provisioning). Infra-adjacent concerns (AWS volume placement, EFS/NFS flock caveat, serverless lifecycle) are explicitly tracked out-of-scope on separate tickets (alto-fruit-punch). The snapshot cache + janitor is app-level filesystem management on an existing host, not IaC. No T10 findings.
